---
title: "Rock Nitrogen"
author: "Rebecca Martinez"
date: "November 14, 2025"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE
)

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(paletteer)
library(tidytext)

# =========================================================
# 1. SUMMER DATA
# =========================================================

summer_tbl <- read_csv("data_raw/rock_samples_SIF_results.csv") |>
  clean_names() |>
  rename(n_ug = n_mg) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      where(is.character),
      ~ str_squish(.) |> str_replace_all(" ", "_") |> tolower()
    ),
    sample_name = str_remove(sample_id, "-[pn]-\\d+$"),
    location = if_else(
      str_detect(sample_name, "^(trn|trw|brn)"),
      "sedgwick",
      "SCI"
    ),
    rock_type = case_when(
      rock_type == "schist_from_conglomerate" ~ "blue_schist",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "vaqueros_conglomerate",
      TRUE ~ rock_type
    )
  ) |>
  filter(rock_type != "ref_soil")

summer_plot <- summer_tbl |>
  mutate(
    sample_rock = case_when(
      sample_name == "sci-blue-schist" ~ "blue_schist",
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "trncp1" ~ "greenstone",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-1" ~ "serpentine",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-2" ~ "serpentine",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-3" ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-4" ~ "greenstone",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-5" ~ "greenstone",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1", "tcd-2", "tcd-3") ~ "shale",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1", "tr-2n") ~ "shale",
      sample_name %in% c("tjv-1", "tjv-2") ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "conglomerate",
      sample_name == "tvs-s" ~ "sandstone",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    geologic_unit = case_when(
      sample_name == "sci-blue-schist" ~ "sc",
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "Qpr",
      sample_name %in% c("trncp1", "trwcp1-1", "trwcp1-2",
                         "trwcp1-3", "trwcp1-4", "trwcp1-5") ~ "f_sp-db",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1", "tcd-2", "tcd-3") ~ "Tcd",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1", "tr-2n") ~ "Tr",
      sample_name %in% c("tjv-1", "tjv-2") ~ "Tjv",
      sample_name %in% c("tvs-c", "tvs-s") ~ "Tvs",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  select(sample_name, sample_rock, location, geologic_unit, n_ppm, n_ug)

# =========================================================
# 2. RILEY DATA
# =========================================================

riley_plot <- read_csv("data_raw/rileyh_n_data.csv") |>
  clean_names() |>
  rename(
    n_ppm = nitrogen_ppm,
    n_ug = nitrogen_ug
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(where(is.character), str_to_lower),
    location = "SCI",
    sample_name = str_replace(sample_id, "-[0-9]+$", "")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    sample_rock = case_when(
      str_detect(sample_name, "^grschist") ~ "green_schist",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^wdg") ~ "diorite",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tjv") ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "qoa-1" ~ "older_alluvium",
      sample_name == "tvs-s" ~ "sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "conglomerate",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tr") ~ "shale",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tcd") ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "montsi-1" ~ "shale",
      sample_name == "tuff-1" ~ "tuff",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    geologic_unit = case_when(
      str_detect(sample_name, "^grschist") ~ "sc",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^wdg") ~ "wdg",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tjv") ~ "Tjv",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tvs") ~ "Tvs",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tr") ~ "Tr",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^tcd") ~ "Tcd",
      str_detect(sample_name, "^qoa") ~ "Qoa",
      sample_name %in% c("montsi-1", "tuff-1") ~ "Tm",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  select(sample_name, sample_rock, location, geologic_unit, n_ppm, n_ug)

# =========================================================
# 3. COMBINE
# =========================================================

combined_plot <- bind_rows(summer_plot, riley_plot)

# =========================================================
# 4. LABELS
# =========================================================

final_plot_tbl <- combined_plot |>
  filter(sample_rock != "blue_schist") |>
  mutate(
    rock_name = case_when(
      sample_name %in% c("wdg-1", "wdg-2") ~ "Willows diorite",
      sample_name %in% c("tjv-1", "tjv-2") ~ "Jolla Viejo sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-s" ~ "Vaqueros sandstone",
      sample_name == "tvs-c" ~ "Vaqueros conglomerate",
      sample_name %in% c("tr-1", "tr-2n") ~ "Rincon shale",
      sample_name %in% c("tcd-1", "tcd-2", "tcd-3") ~ "Cozy Dell shale",
      sample_name %in% c("grschist-1", "grschist-2") ~ "Santa Cruz schist",
      sample_name == "qoa-1" ~ "Older alluvium",
      sample_name == "montsi-1" ~ "Monterey shale",
      sample_name == "tuff-1" ~ "Monterey tuff",
      sample_name == "brncp1" ~ "Paso Robles shale",
      sample_name == "trncp1" ~ "Franciscan greenstone",
      sample_name %in% c("trwcp1-1", "trwcp1-2") ~ "Franciscan serpentine",
      sample_name == "trwcp1-3" ~ "Franciscan shale",
      sample_name %in% c("trwcp1-4", "trwcp1-5") ~ "Franciscan greenstone",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

order_levels <- c(
  "Santa Cruz schist",
  "Willows diorite",
  "Monterey tuff",
  "Monterey shale",
  "Older alluvium",
  "Rincon shale",
  "Vaqueros conglomerate",
  "Jolla Viejo sandstone",
  "Cozy Dell shale",
  "Vaqueros sandstone",
  "Franciscan greenstone",
  "Franciscan serpentine",
  "Franciscan shale",
  "Paso Robles shale"
)

final_plot_tbl <- final_plot_tbl |>
  mutate(
    rock_name = factor(rock_name, levels = order_levels)
  )

# =========================================================
# 5. PLOT
# =========================================================

ggplot(
  final_plot_tbl,
  aes(x = rock_name, y = n_ppm, fill = sample_rock, color = sample_rock)
) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(
    ~location,
    scales = "free_x",
    space = "free_x",
    labeller = as_labeller(c(
      SCI = "Santa Cruz Island",
      sedgwick = "Sedgwick"
    ))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  scale_color_paletteer_d("ggthemes::Miller_Stone") +
  labs(y = "Nitrogen (ppm)", x = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(  
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
  

```
